previewInstruction:
Read the clues. Drag each friend onto a seat so all the clues are true at the same time. Then tap CHECK.

Tip: Left and right are from your view, looking at the picture.
previewAudioText: Read the clues, then drag each friend onto a seat so that every clue is true at the same time. When all the seats are full, tap CHECK. Left and right are from your view, looking at the picture.
